# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK: "1"
  PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR: "1"

default:
  image: python:latest
  before_script:
    - python --version
    - pip --version
    - pip install -r requirements.txt

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - pytest -q
  artifacts:
    when: always
    reports:
      junit: junit.xml
    paths:
      - junit.xml

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - python -m compileall .
    - python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel || true
  artifacts:
    when: on_success
    paths:
      - dist/
      - build/
  needs:
    - test

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploy step - replace with your deployment commands"
  needs:
    - build
  only:
    - main
